addons.name: Classic Picnic Basket
addons.description: Shared picnic basket with local cheese, fruit, and lemonade for up to 4 guests.

addons.name: Deluxe Picnic Basket
addons.description: Upgraded picnic with gourmet sandwiches, snacks, and sparkling cider for up to 4 guests.

addons.name: Birthday Cupcake Upgrade
addons.description: Assorted llama-themed cupcakes for your party guests, includes simple candle display.

addons.name: School Bus Parking
addons.description: Reserved parking area and guidance for school or charter buses.

addons.name: Cabin Breakfast Basket
addons.description: Farm-fresh breakfast basket delivered each morning, includes pastries, yogurt, and juice for two.

addons.name: Indoor Party Space Upgrade
addons.description: Guaranteed indoor party room with decorations, ideal for rainy or hot days.

gift_card_products.name: Digital Llama Farm Gift Card
gift_card_products.description: Email-delivered gift card redeemable for tours, workshops, lodging, and the farm shop.

gift_card_products.name: Physical Llama Farm Gift Card
gift_card_products.description: Printed gift card mailed in a llama-themed envelope, redeemable on-site at the farm.

gift_card_products.name: Fiber Workshop Gift Card
gift_card_products.description: Digital gift card intended for use on fiber and spinning workshops.

lodging_properties.name: Llama View Cabin
lodging_properties.description: Cozy one-bedroom cabin overlooking the main llama pasture, perfect for a quiet farm retreat.

lodging_properties.name: Pasture-Side Yurt
lodging_properties.description: Glamping yurt tucked beside the lower pasture, with easy access to morning llama feedings.

lodging_properties.name: Farmhouse Suite
lodging_properties.description: Upstairs suite in the historic farmhouse with private entrance and porch.

party_packages.name: Llama Birthday Party
party_packages.description: A 2-hour birthday celebration with a private llama meet-and-greet, photo time, and party space.

party_packages.name: School Field Trip
party_packages.description: Curriculum-aligned field trip with hands-on llama activities and age-appropriate lessons.

party_packages.name: Private Pasture Party
party_packages.description: Customizable private event in the upper pasture with flexible layout and add-ons.

party_packages.name: Llama Learning Day
party_packages.description: Half-day educational program focused on llama care, fiber, and farm stewardship.

promo_codes.description: 10% off eligible llama fiber and farm workshops.
$5 off fiber products in the farm shop.

tour_activities.name: Family Llama Farm Tour
tour_activities.description: Guided family-friendly tour of the llama barns and pastures, with hands-on feeding time.

tour_activities.name: Morning Llama Farm Tour
tour_activities.description: Small-group morning tour focused on daily farm chores and llama care.

tour_activities.name: Guided Llama Walk
tour_activities.description: Leisurely walk through the upper pasture with halter-trained llamas, guided by a handler.

tour_activities.name: Sunrise Llama Walk
tour_activities.description: Early-morning walk with llamas as the farm wakes up, includes coffee or tea.

tour_activities.name: Llama Farm Highlights Tour
tour_activities.description: Overview tour ideal for first-time visitors, covering the main barns and fiber studio.

tour_activities.name: Kids Llama Meet-Up
tour_activities.description: Playful session just for kids with brushing, photo time, and a short story about llamas.

tour_activities.name: Behind-the-Scenes Llama Care
tour_activities.description: Hands-on experience helping staff with feed, health checks, and barn care.

tour_activities.name: Evening Pasture Visit
tour_activities.description: Relaxed pasture visit at sunset with time for photos and questions.

tour_activities.name: Llama Photo Session
tour_activities.description: Hosted session for photographers and influencers with specially trained llamas.

tour_activities.name: Weekend Family Llama Combo
tour_activities.description: Bundle of a farm tour plus a short guided llama walk, ideal for weekend visitors.

tour_activities.name: Mini Llama Walk
tour_activities.description: Shorter walk for families with younger children, staying close to the barns.

tour_activities.name: Llama Farm Tour
tour_activities.description: Classic general tour of the farm, ideal for pairing with a llama walk in a weekend itinerary.

workshops.name: Beginner Spinning with Llama Fiber
workshops.description: Learn the basics of spinning soft llama fiber into yarn using a drop spindle.

workshops.name: Intro to Llama Fiber
workshops.description: Overview of llama fiber types, preparation, and simple hands-on carding.

workshops.name: Llama Fiber Art Weekend
workshops.description: Two-session workshop covering spinning, dyeing, and simple weaving with llama fiber.

workshops.name: Llama Care 101
workshops.description: Class on basic llama husbandry, nutrition, and health checks for aspiring owners.

workshops.name: Kids Fiber Play Session
workshops.description: Hands-on fiber fun for kids, including simple felting and fiber painting with safe dyes.

workshops.name: Farm Photography Basics
workshops.description: Learn to photograph llamas and farm life using natural light.

workshops.name: Advanced Llama Spinning Retreat
workshops.description: Advanced techniques for consistent yarn, plying, and color blending with llama fiber.

workshops.name: Weekend Farm Immersion
workshops.description: Two-day experience covering daily farm chores, animal care, and fiber basics.

workshops.name: Llama Fiber Spinning Sampler
workshops.description: Short sampler class to try spinning llama fiber before committing to a full course.

workshops.name: Felted Llama Ornaments
workshops.description: Create your own felted llama ornaments using farm-sourced fiber.

gift_card_purchases.message: Happy birthday! Enjoy a day with llamas on me.

products.name: Barn Chill Llama Lounge Socks - Cream
products.description: Soft lounge socks with a brushed llama wool interior, ideal for cabin evenings.

products.name: Kids Llama Fun Socks
products.description: Colorful kids socks with playful llama patterns, made with a soft wool blend.

products.name: Premium Heavyweight Llama Boot Socks
products.description: Extra-thick boot socks for winter chores, knit with high-density llama wool.

products.name: Summer-Weight Llama Socks
products.description: Lightweight low-cut socks for warm weather walks around the farm.

products.name: Cozy Cabin Llama Socks
products.description: Chunky knit socks perfect for cabin stays and evenings by the fire.

products.name: Llama Logo Beanie
products.description: Knit beanie featuring the farm’s llama logo patch.

products.name: Pasture-Soft Llama Scarf
products.description: Handwoven scarf from farm-raised llama fiber.

products.name: Llama Farm T-Shirt (Unisex)
products.description: Cotton t-shirt with a playful llama illustration.

products.description: Email-delivered gift card redeemable for tours, workshops, lodging, and the farm shop.

products.description: Printed gift card mailed in a llama-illustrated envelope.

products.name: Llama Fiber Roving Bundle
products.description: 8 oz bundle of washed and carded llama fiber roving, ready for spinning.

products.name: Llama Pasture Poster Print
products.description: 12x18 art print of llamas grazing in the upper pasture.

products.name: Llama Farm Enamel Mug

products.name: Plush Llama Toy
products.description: Soft plush llama toy modeled after one of our farm favorites.
